case_title: AETNA FINANCE CO, INC DBA ITT FINANCIAL SERVICES VS BARNS MERL O

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY AETNA FINANCE CO, INC DBA ITT FINANCIAL SERVICES SF3 AS TO DEFENDANT BARNS MERL O ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-26-1992 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 06
